name: Adverse Action Notice Compliance
outcome: Gated two-step chain for adverse action notice compliance. Step 1 builds the notice skeleton from SHAP-ranked FICO or VantageScore factor codes. Gate: action_taken=approved exits immediately (no notice required for approved applications). Denied, counteroffer, or incomplete applications continue to Step 2 notice validation against Reg B §1002.9 completeness requirements and CFPB Circular prohibited-vague-code list.
